race.comment: FIRE BOMBER (2) returned in good order with a solid victory at Ipswich and winning rider Wilson Taylor sticks in the saddle. Looks the runner in this field with the most upside and can go back-to-back to start the campaign. ENFORCEABLE (4) grows a leg for hoop Lloyd who is yet to miss a drum in four steers. Strips fitter second-up from the spell and has to be included in calculations. AVE CANTARE (6) was a touch plain last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Worth another chance. I'LLTELLYOUTONIGHT (10) has won two from three around this circuit and rarely puts in a poor one. Can play a role in the finish. The well-related MISHANI WITNESS (5) (half to Listed winner and G2 placed Mishani Hustler) is a last-start victor who shouldn't be slept on.
